name: KUNKUN Defender
short_description: KUNKUN Defender is an FPS + tower defense game where players need to resist zombie invasions in different regions affected by a virus outbreak until a helicopter comes for rescue.
detailed_description:
Oh no! The Kun Virus has broken out. A group of zombies infected with the Kun Virus is using Iron Mountain to crazily ram into any living creature. You must pick up your gun to fight against the onslaught of Kun-infected zombies until Big Joe arrives in a helicopter to rescue you.

Game Features

A perfect blend of tower defense and FPS.
Choose from 30 different weapons.
Drink beverages to boost attributes.
Face off against waves of zombies.
Three different maps.
Survive until a certain round to leave.

supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese*, English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Spanish - Latin America, Korean
*languages with full audio support
